name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders, lower to chest, press up.

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to 30-45 degrees, press barbell from upper chest.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Set bench to decline, press barbell from lower chest.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Press dumbbells from chest level with controlled movement.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Press dumbbells at 30-45 degree incline.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Arc dumbbells out and down, squeeze chest to bring together.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Set cables at chest height, bring handles together in hugging motion.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width, lower body until chest near floor, push up.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: Lean forward on dip bars, lower until stretch in chest, press up.

name: Barbell Back Squat
instructions: Bar on upper back, squat to parallel or below, drive through heels.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Bar on front delts, elbows up, squat to depth.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold weight at chest, squat between legs, drive up.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width on platform, lower sled, press back up.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Extend legs against pad, squeeze at top, control descent.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Curl pad toward glutes, squeeze hamstrings, control back down.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hinge at hips, lower bar along legs with slight knee bend, squeeze glutes to stand.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into lunge, alternate legs walking forward.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot elevated on bench, squat on front leg.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Rise onto toes, squeeze at top, lower with control.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on bench, bar on hips, drive hips up, squeeze glutes.

name: Conventional Deadlift
instructions: Feet hip-width, grip outside knees, drive through floor, lock out hips.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance, grip inside knees, drive hips forward to lockout.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
instructions: Stand inside trap bar, grip handles, stand up.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge forward, row bar to lower chest/upper abs, squeeze back.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: One hand on bench, row dumbbell to hip, squeeze lat.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Sit upright, pull handle to torso, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Wide grip, pull bar to upper chest, control back up.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Overhand grip, pull chin over bar, lower with control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Underhand grip, pull chin over bar, lower with control.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle bar, row to chest, squeeze back.

name: Face Pull
instructions: High cable, pull rope to face, externally rotate at end.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Press bar from front of shoulders to overhead lockout.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Press dumbbells overhead from shoulder height.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells out to sides to shoulder height.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Raise dumbbells forward to shoulder height.

name: Reverse Fly
instructions: Hinge forward, raise dumbbells out to sides.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Start with palms facing you, rotate and press overhead.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Pull weight up along body to chin height, elbows high.

name: Barbell Shrug
instructions: Shrug shoulders up toward ears, hold, lower.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Curl bar up keeping elbows at sides, squeeze at top.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl dumbbells alternating or together, squeeze at top.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Neutral grip curls, targets brachialis and forearms.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Arms on pad, curl bar up, control descent.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Curl from stretched position on incline bench.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Curl cable handle up, constant tension throughout.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Push rope/bar down, lock out elbows, squeeze triceps.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Extend weight overhead, lower behind head, press up.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lower bar to forehead, extend arms, squeeze triceps.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
instructions: Narrow grip bench press emphasizing triceps.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Upright torso, dip down, press up focusing on triceps.

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Hinge forward, extend arm back, squeeze tricep.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold push-up position on forearms, maintain straight line.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from bar, raise legs to parallel or above.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel at cable, crunch down bringing elbows to knees.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Roll wheel forward, extend body, roll back.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with torso reclined, rotate side to side.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Press cable handle away from chest, resist rotation.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on back, extend opposite arm and leg while bracing core.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Support body on forearm and feet side-on, hold.

name: Farmer's Carry
instructions: Carry heavy weights at sides, walk with upright posture.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Alternating or simultaneous waves with heavy ropes.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Jump onto box, land softly, step down.

name: Burpee
instructions: Drop to push-up, push up, jump to feet, jump up.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge and swing kettlebell to shoulder height, drive hips.

name: Clean and Press
instructions: Clean bar to shoulders, press overhead.

name: Power Clean
instructions: Explosive pull from floor, catch at shoulders.

name: Thruster
instructions: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid motion.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Drive sled forward with arms extended.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Drive with legs, lean back, pull handle to lower ribs.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Climb continuously at steady pace.

name: Treadmill Run
instructions: Run at target pace and incline.

name: Assault Bike
instructions: Pedal and push/pull handles for full body cardio.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Jump continuously, wrists drive rope.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Plank position, drive knees to chest alternating.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Single arm lateral raise with constant cable tension.

name: Rear Delt Fly Machine
instructions: Reverse pec deck motion targeting rear delts.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Shoulders under pads, squat down and drive up.

name: Smith Machine Squat
instructions: Squat in guided smith machine path.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar on back, hinge forward at hips, return upright.

name: Cable Glute Kickback
instructions: Kick leg back against cable resistance.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Knees under pad, raise heels, squeeze at top.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Press handles forward from chest level.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Bring pads together in front of chest.

name: Landmine Press
instructions: Press bar end upward at an angle.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Seated, elbow on inner thigh, curl dumbbell.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Rest forearms on bench, curl wrists up.

name: Reverse Curl
instructions: Curl with overhand grip targeting forearms.

name: Hip Adductor Machine
instructions: Squeeze legs together against pads.

name: Hip Abductor Machine
instructions: Push legs apart against pads.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
instructions: Kneel with feet anchored, lower body forward eccentrically.

name: Single Leg RDL
instructions: Hinge on one leg, extend other leg behind for balance.

name: Dumbbell Step-Up
instructions: Step onto box driving through front foot.

name: Sissy Squat
instructions: Lean back with straight torso, bend knees deeply.

name: Cable Woodchop
instructions: Rotate torso pulling cable from high to low or reverse.

name: V-Up
instructions: Simultaneously raise legs and torso to form V shape.

name: Incline DB Curl
instructions: Curl dumbbells from fully stretched position on incline.

name: EZ Bar Curl
instructions: Curl EZ bar with angled grip for wrist comfort.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Push-up with hands close together forming diamond shape.

name: JM Press
instructions: Hybrid of close-grip bench and skull crusher.
